kingdom_guard.name: Kingdom Guard
kingdom_guard.description: Soldiers, scouts, and officials trying to keep the roads and village holdings stable.

merchant_guild.name: Merchant Guild
merchant_guild.description: Caravan masters, traders, ferrymen, and suppliers who care about safe routes and fair trade.

thieves_circle.name: Thieves Circle
thieves_circle.description: Smugglers, raiders, and quiet criminals who profit when the roads turn uncertain.

shrine_keepers.name: Shrine Keepers
shrine_keepers.description: Caretakers, scholars, and ritual custodians trying to preserve sacred history and old wards.

forest_clans.name: Forest Clans
forest_clans.description: Hunters, elders, and wilderness folk who measure outsiders by how they treat the land and those on the road.

cult_of_ash.name: Cult of Ash
cult_of_ash.description: A destructive sect drawn to corruption, ruined sanctuaries, and unstable old power.
